hooks.command: cd "/Users/umairahmed/Desktop/Personal Projects/quickbooks-project" && CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only HEAD 2>/dev/null; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^quickbooks-dataengineering-frontend/"; then echo "--- Frontend validation ---" && cd "/Users/umairahmed/Desktop/Personal Projects/quickbooks-project/quickbooks-dataengineering-frontend" && npm run build && npm run lint; fi; if echo "$CHANGED" | grep -q "^quickbooks-dataengineering-pipeline/"; then echo "--- Backend validation ---" && cd "/Users/umairahmed/Desktop/Personal Projects/quickbooks-project/quickbooks-dataengineering-pipeline" && python -m pytest -q; fi

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; if [ -n "$f" ]; then case "$f" in *.py) if ruff format "$f" 2>/dev/null; then jq -cn --arg m "ruff: formatted $f" '{systemMessage: $m}'; fi ;; *.ts|*.tsx) if cd "/Users/umairahmed/Desktop/Personal Projects/quickbooks-project/quickbooks-dataengineering-frontend" && npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; then jq -cn --arg m "prettier: formatted $f" '{systemMessage: $m}'; fi ;; esac; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
